grantsPool.label: Hunter's Mark — free casts
grantsPool.reminder: Favored Enemy: free cast of Hunter's Mark (no slot).

ref.title: Favored Enemy
body: Hunter's Mark is always prepared, and you can cast it without a spell slot a number of times equal to your Proficiency Bonus per long rest.

ref.title: Deft Explorer
body: You gain Expertise in one skill you're proficient with, and you learn two additional languages.

ref.title: Weapon Mastery
body: You can use the mastery property of two kinds of weapons of your choice; you can change the choices after a long rest. Pick them in the Weapon Mastery panel.

ref.title: Fighting Style
body: You gain a Fighting Style feat of your choice (Archery, Defense, Dueling, Two-Weapon Fighting, etc.) — record it on your sheet.

ref.title: Fighting Style
body: You gain a Fighting Style feat of your choice (Defense, Dueling, Archery, Great Weapon Fighting, etc.) — record it on your sheet.

ref.title: Second Wind
body: As a Bonus Action, regain 1d10 + your fighter level hit points. Regain your uses on a short or long rest.
Tap Use to spend a charge, then roll the d10 and apply it with the Heal control.

ref.title: Weapon Mastery
body: You can use the mastery property of three kinds of weapons of your choice; change the choices after a long rest. Pick them in the Weapon Mastery panel.

ref.title: Action Surge
body: On your turn, take one additional action — most often a second Attack action. Regain it on a short or long rest.

ref.title: Tactical Mind
body: When you fail an ability check, you can expend a use of Second Wind to add 1d10 to the check. If it still fails, you don't lose the Second Wind use.

ref.title: Extra Attack
body: You can attack twice, instead of once, whenever you take the Attack action on your turn.

ref.title: Tactical Shift
body: Whenever you activate Second Wind, you can move up to half your Speed without provoking Opportunity Attacks.

ref.title: Arcane Recovery
body: Once per day when you finish a short rest, recover expended spell slots whose levels total up to half your wizard level (rounded up), none of 6th level or higher.
Tap Use to mark it spent; it returns on a long rest.

ref.title: Ritual Adept
body: You can cast any spell with the Ritual tag as a ritual if it's in your spellbook, without preparing it — it just takes 10 minutes longer and uses no slot.

ref.title: Scholar
body: You gain Expertise in one Intelligence-based skill you're proficient with: Arcana, History, Investigation, Medicine, Nature, or Religion.

ref.title: Memorize Spell
body: Whenever you finish a short rest, you can swap one prepared wizard spell for a different spell from your spellbook.

ref.title: Divine Order
body: Choose Protector — proficiency with martial weapons and heavy armor — or Thaumaturge — an extra cantrip and a bonus to your Intelligence (Arcana/Religion) checks. Record your choice.

ref.title: Channel Divinity
body: A Magic action that fuels a divine option — Divine Spark (heal or radiant/necrotic damage) or Turn Undead. You regain one use on a short rest and all on a long rest.

ref.title: Sear Undead
body: Whenever you use Turn Undead, you also deal radiant damage to each affected undead equal to a roll of your Wisdom modifier in d8s.

ref.title: Expertise
body: Double your Proficiency Bonus on two chosen skill proficiencies (more at higher levels).

ref.title: Sneak Attack
body: Once per turn, deal extra damage (scaling with level) when you hit with a Finesse or Ranged weapon and have Advantage, or an ally is adjacent to the target and you don't have Disadvantage.

ref.title: Thieves' Cant
body: A secret mix of dialect, jargon, and code that lets you hide messages in seemingly normal conversation.

ref.title: Weapon Mastery
body: You gain the mastery property of a number of weapons you're proficient with.

ref.title: Cunning Action
body: A Bonus Action each turn to Dash, Disengage, or Hide.

ref.title: Steady Aim
body: Bonus Action (if you haven't moved): Advantage on your next attack this turn; your speed becomes 0 until end of turn.

ref.title: Cunning Strike
body: When you Sneak Attack, trade dice for effects like Poison, Trip, or Withdraw.

ref.title: Evasion
body: When a Dex save halves damage, you take none on a success and half on a failure.

ref.title: Reliable Talent
body: Treat any d20 of 9 or lower as a 10 on ability checks using a skill you're proficient with.

ref.title: Martial Arts
body: Use Dex for unarmed strikes and monk weapons; roll a Martial Arts die for their damage; make one unarmed strike as a Bonus Action after the Attack action.

ref.title: Unarmored Defense (Monk)
body: While unarmored and not wielding a shield, your AC equals 10 + your Dexterity modifier + your Wisdom modifier.

ref.title: Ki / Monk's Focus
body: Spend Ki to fuel Flurry of Blows, Patient Defense, and Step of the Wind. Regain on a short or long rest.

ref.title: Unarmored Movement
body: Your speed increases while unarmored and not wielding a shield (already in your Speed).

ref.title: Deflect Missiles
body: Reaction when hit by a ranged weapon attack: reduce the damage by 1d10 + Dex + monk level; if reduced to 0, catch and optionally throw it back for 1 Ki.

ref.title: Slow Fall
body: Reaction when you fall: reduce the falling damage by 5 × your monk level.

ref.title: Extra Attack
body: You can attack twice whenever you take the Attack action on your turn.

ref.title: Stunning Strike
body: Spend 1 Ki on a hit to force a Con save or stun the target until your next turn.

ref.title: Ki-Empowered Strikes
body: Your unarmed strikes count as magical for overcoming resistance.

ref.title: Stillness of Mind
body: Action to end one effect on yourself causing you to be Charmed or Frightened.
